name: Tusk
description: After a bar brawl it's customary, as a courtesy, to buy everyone who's still standing a round of drinks.

abilities.name: Bitter Chill
abilities.description: The higher Tusk's level, the greater the attack speed slow applied.

abilities.name: Ice Shards
abilities.description: Throws a ball of frozen energy that damages all enemy units it comes in contact with. When the ball its point-targeted location, the shards are released, creating a temporary path blocker.

abilities.name: Snowball
abilities.description: Procs sources upon impact. Regardless if either or the unit-targeted enemy is affected by,, or sources.

abilities.name: Tag Team
abilities.description: Creates a negative debuff aura around Tusk, causing enemy units that are attacked under it to have reduced movement speed. Conditionally grants allied units attacking the debuffed enemy unit bonus physical attack damage.

abilities.name: Drinking Buddies
abilities.description: Reaches out to tag an allied unit and pulls them closer. Grants both Tusk and the tagged ally bonus movement speed and bonus armor once tagged. Pulls only Tusk toward the affected ally with Alt-Cast toggled on.

abilities.name: Walrus Kick
abilities.description: Kicks the closest enemy unit in a targeted direction, stunning, damaging, and slowing them. Upon the affected unit landing, Tusk deals damage to all enemy heroes within the landing radius.

abilities.name: Walrus PUNCH!
abilities.description: Applies a critical strike so powerful it launches its victim into the air. Launches a based on 's hero model and spins toward the target. Displays an alternate ability animation () when used on, displays on other unit-targeted enemies.
